languages.text: "Чем обязана вниманию?" {n}Бархатный тон, которым Ювенна приветствует вас, безукоризненно учтив, но холоден. Все в ней — фигура, поза, даже выражение ярко-синих глаз — излучает вежливую отстраненность.{/n}

"To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Чем обязана вниманию?" {n}Бархатный тон, которым Ювенна приветствует вас, безукоризненно учтив, но холоден. Все в ней — фигура, поза, даже выражение ярко-синих глаз — излучает вежливую отстраненность.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

"To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

"To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

languages.text: «¿A qué debo su atención?». {n}El tono aterciopelado con el que te recibe Juvenna es de una cortesía impecable, pero también frío. Todo su ser (su figura, su postura e incluso la expresión de sus intensos ojos azules) irradia un distanciamiento educado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿A qué debo su atención?». {n}El tono aterciopelado con el que te recibe Juvenna es de una cortesía impecable, pero también frío. Todo su ser (su figura, su postura e incluso la expresión de sus intensos ojos azules) irradia un distanciamiento educado.{/n}

languages.text: “不知您为何如此关注我？”{n}尤文娜问候你的声调如丝绒般柔滑，礼数周全，却透着冰冷。她的一切——身姿、仪态，乃至那双明亮蓝眼中的神采——都散发着一种彬彬有礼的疏离感。{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “不知您为何如此关注我？”{n}尤文娜问候你的声调如丝绒般柔滑，礼数周全，却透着冰冷。她的一切——身姿、仪态，乃至那双明亮蓝眼中的神采——都散发着一种彬彬有礼的疏离感。{/n}

languages.text: « Que me vaut une telle attention de votre part ? » {n}Si le ton sur lequel Juvenna s'adresse à vous est d'une courtoisie irréprochable, sa froideur est tout aussi palpable. Tout en elle, de sa posture à l'expression qui anime ses yeux d'un bleu glacial, exsude une réserve et une distance guindées.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Que me vaut une telle attention de votre part ? » {n}Si le ton sur lequel Juvenna s'adresse à vous est d'une courtoisie irréprochable, sa froideur est tout aussi palpable. Tout en elle, de sa posture à l'expression qui anime ses yeux d'un bleu glacial, exsude une réserve et une distance guindées.{/n}

languages.text: "İlginizi neye borçluyum?" {n}Juvenna'nın seni selamlarken kullandığı kadife ses tonu, kusursuz derecede nazik ama soğuk. Bedeni, duruşu, hatta parlak mavi gözlerindeki ifade bile... Onda her şey kibar bir mesafe yayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İlginizi neye borçluyum?" {n}Juvenna'nın seni selamlarken kullandığı kadife ses tonu, kusursuz derecede nazik ama soğuk. Bedeni, duruşu, hatta parlak mavi gözlerindeki ifade bile... Onda her şey kibar bir mesafe yayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was verschafft mir Eure Aufmerksamkeit?" {n}Der sanfte Ton, mit dem dich Juvenna begrüßt, ist ausgesprochen höflich, aber kalt. Alles an ihr — ihre Figur, ihr Auftreten und selbst der Ausdruck in ihren strahlend blauen Augen — zeugt von höflicher Zurückhaltung.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was verschafft mir Eure Aufmerksamkeit?" {n}Der sanfte Ton, mit dem dich Juvenna begrüßt, ist ausgesprochen höflich, aber kalt. Alles an ihr — ihre Figur, ihr Auftreten und selbst der Ausdruck in ihren strahlend blauen Augen — zeugt von höflicher Zurückhaltung.{/n}

languages.text: 「お気に召すところ、何でしょうか？」{n}ジュヴェナがあなたに声をかける時の声は、上品で丁寧だが、どこか冷たく感じられる。彼女の姿、立ち振る舞い、そして明るい青い瞳の表情まで、全てが、礼儀正しくも距離を置いていることを感じさせる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「お気に召すところ、何でしょうか？」{n}ジュヴェナがあなたに声をかける時の声は、上品で丁寧だが、どこか冷たく感じられる。彼女の姿、立ち振る舞い、そして明るい青い瞳の表情まで、全てが、礼儀正しくも距離を置いていることを感じさせる。{/n}
